memoryArtifacts.description: Coat of arms of Bernard De La Tour. With de La Tour d'Auvergne shield symbol, and Saint-Omer and Adhémar + sign symbols. With French noble yellow lily on blue symbol. With Beaumont yellow French lily arrangment.
Armorial achievement  of: aux Grenons Count De Boulogne.
Crest of ville fr Boulogne sur Mer. With shared noble swan design. With Comte Grenon three red circles on yellow shield. http://fournetmarcel.free.fr/blasonsboulogne.htm .

法國奧維普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III於大約1275年出生在法國奧維普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維時，他的父親Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne21歲，母親Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues16歲。他於1295年11月17日與Béatrix de Rodez在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1335年12月19日在法國奧維普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III于大约1275年出生在法国奧維普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維时，他的父亲Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne21岁，母亲Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues16岁。他于1295年11月17日与Béatrix de Rodez在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1335年12月19日在法国奧維普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Tour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ramez, Ashraf, Bakr, Mohamed, Mostafa, Nabil, Samir, Abdalla, Adib, Ali, Amir, Ebrahim.  Romanian Sorin, Dragos.
Romanian: nickname from nour, a variant of nor ‘cloud’.

variants.name: Nur
meanings: Muslim: from a personal name based on Arabic nūr ‘light, illumination’. Al-Nūr ‘the Light’ is an attribute of Allah, giving rise to the compound name ʿAbd al-Nūr, ʿAbdul-Nūr (see Abdelnour ). The word nūr is also found in combinations such as Nūr-Allāh or Nurullāh ‘Light of Allah’, Nūr ud-Dīn or Nuruddin ‘Light of Religion’. Compare Noor , Nor , and Nour .

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III was born about 1275, in La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, his father, Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne, was 21 and his mother, Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues, was 16. He married Béatrix de Rodez on 17 November 1295, in La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 19 December 1335, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III est né environ 1275, à La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, son père, Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Béatrix de Rodez le 17 novembre 1295, à La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1335, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III um 1275 in La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne 21 und seine Mutter Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues 16. Er hat am 17. November 1295 in La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Béatrix de Rodez geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Dezember 1335 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III è nato il circa 1275 nel La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, il suo padre, Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Béatrix de Rodez il 17 novembre 1295, nel La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 dicembre 1335, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

フランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメラ トウル-ド'アウバーグン
ja.lifeSummary: Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne IIIが約1275年にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメラ トウル-ド'アウバーグンで生まれた時，父Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergneは21歳，母Béatrix de Meymont d’Olierguesは16歳であった。1295年11月17日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメラ トウル-ド'アウバーグンでBéatrix de Rodezと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1335年12月19日にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III(이)가 대략 1275년 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 라 토우-드'오버그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1295년 11월 17일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 라 토우-드'오버그니에서 Béatrix de Rodez(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 12월 19일 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrix de Rodez em 17 de novembro de 1295, em La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1335, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III родился около 1275 г. в местности ла тоур-д'аувиргн, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция, его отцу по имени Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrix de Rodez 17 ноября 1295 г. в местности ла тоур-д'аувиргн, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 декабря 1335 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III nació aproximadamente 1275, en La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Béatrix de Rodez el 17 de noviembre de 1295, en La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1335, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
